# attestto-mobile

> Camera companion PWA for the Attestto desktop app. Your phone becomes the document and selfie capture device. Images travel over local WiFi via WebSocket вҖ” no server, no cloud, no PII transmitted.

Deployed at [mobile.attestto.com](https://mobile.attestto.com). Part of the [Attestto Open](https://attestto.org) ecosystem.

## What it does

The desktop app (`attestto-desktop`) needs high-quality photos of a user's identity document and a selfie for biometric liveness. A phone camera is better for this than a laptop webcam.

Flow:
```
Desktop (Electron)              Phone (this PWA)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ            в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Shows QR code    в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Җ WiFi в”Җв”Җв–әв”Ӯ 1. Front of document в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Receives images  в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ 2. Back of document  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Runs OCR         в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ 3. Selfie + liveness в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Validates PadrГіn в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ    (blink detection) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Stores credentialв”Ӯ            в”Ӯ 4. Done вҶ’ install PWAв”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ            в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

1. Desktop starts a local WebSocket server and displays a QR code
2. User scans QR on their phone вҖ” opens this PWA with the WebSocket URL
3. PWA guides through 3 capture steps (document front, back, selfie)
4. Each image is sent as base64 JPEG over WebSocket to the desktop
5. Desktop acknowledges each step; PWA advances

All processing (OCR, liveness, PadrГіn validation, credential storage) happens on the desktop. The phone is a capture-only device.

## Privacy

Images never leave your local network. The phone sends directly to your own desktop over WebSocket вҖ” there is no intermediate server, no cloud upload, no PII transmitted outside the local network.

## Stack

- Vue 3 + TypeScript
- Vite + vite-plugin-pwa (installable PWA)
- Tailwind CSS
- WebSocket (`ws://` connection to desktop capture server)
- `getUserMedia` (camera access)
- GitHub Pages deployment (HTTPS required for `getUserMedia`)

## Capture flow

**Step 1 вҖ” Document front**
Card frame overlay. User aligns document within frame. Tap to capture or use auto-capture.

**Step 2 вҖ” Document back**
Same card frame overlay.

**Step 3 вҖ” Selfie + passive liveness**
Face oval overlay. Blink detection for passive liveness check.

If camera access is blocked, file input fallback is available at each step.

After all 3 steps: success screen + prompt to install PWA to home screen.

## How the WebSocket connection works

The QR code URL format:
```
https://mobile.attestto.com/capture?ws=ws://192.168.1.X:PORT/ws/SESSION_ID
```

The PWA extracts `ws=` from the query string and connects immediately. No user action needed beyond scanning the QR.

Message protocol (JSON over WebSocket):
```
Phone вҶ’ Desktop:  { type: 'image', step: 'front' | 'back' | 'selfie', data: '<base64 JPEG>' }
Desktop вҶ’ Phone:  { type: 'ack', step: 'front' | 'back' | 'selfie' }
Desktop вҶ’ Phone:  { type: 'complete' }
Desktop вҶ’ Phone:  { type: 'error', message: string }
```

## Development

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev     # starts on https://localhost:5173 (HTTPS needed for getUserMedia in dev)
pnpm build
```

## Deployment

Deployed automatically to GitHub Pages on push to `main` via `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`. Custom domain: `mobile.attestto.com` (CNAME).

HTTPS is provided by GitHub Pages вҖ” required for `getUserMedia` to work without cert warnings on phones.

## Related repos

| Repo | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `attestto-desktop` | The desktop app that receives images from this PWA |
| `attestto-app` | Mobile-first PWA wallet (everyday credential use вҖ” separate from this) |
